Q
QuantLab/ SMA Crossover Backtester
Phase 1 MVP

SMA Crossover Backtest

Long-only strategy that buys when the fast SMA crosses above the slow SMA and exits when it crosses below. Signal is shifted one day forward to prevent lookahead bias.

Parameters

Data via Yahoo Finance · Adjusted close prices
One-way cost · signal shifted 1 day · adjusted close prices
QuantLab — for research purposes only. Not financial advice.Data via Yahoo Finance
